    abandonRecoveredMatch(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.client.VirtualServer
    Tells the server to tear down a suspended match the player chose not to resume.

    AbandonRecoveredMatchRequest - Record Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.message.request
    Request a reconnecting player sends when they choose "Leave this match" on the reconnect screen instead of resuming a match that survived a server crash.

    ActionResolutionState - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.states
    Phase in which each player, in offer-track order, resolves the action of the tile their totem sits on: gain food and/or take cards.
    ActionResolutionState() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.states.ActionResolutionState

    Returns the value of the active record component.

    Returns the value of the activePlayer record component.
    addBuilderDiscount(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.PickSimulation
    Increases the simulated Builder discount (e.g. a freshly picked Builder).
    addBuilding(Building) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Tribe
    Adds a building to the tribe.
    addCard(Player, Card) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Tribe
    Adds a card to the tribe, delegating to the card's own placement logic (which routes it to the characters or the buildings).
    addCharacter(TribeCharacter) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Tribe
    Adds a character to the tribe.
    addFood(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.PickSimulation
    Adds food to the simulation (e.g. a Hunter feeding the tribe).
    addFood(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Player
    Adds food, or removes it when amount is negative.
    addObserver(GameObserver) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Game
    Registers an observer (ignored if null or already registered).
    addPlayerToLobby(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchController
    Adds a new player to the lobby.

    Joins the lobby of an existing match.

    Creates an instance of a AddPlayerToLobbyRequest record class.
    addPP(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Player
    Adds victory points, or removes them when amount is negative.
    addToTribe(Player, Tribe) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Card
    Adds this card to the given tribe; each subtype routes itself to the right collection and applies its on-add side effects.
    Ansi - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.tui
    ANSI escape sequences used by the TUI.
    applyPickEffect(PickSimulation) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Card
    Validation phase: declare how being picked at this point in the sequence affects the simulated food / builder discount / hunter count.
    armReconnect() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.tui.TuiView
    Arms the recovery handshake watch before a ReconnectRequest is sent.
    AsyncClientHandler - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server
    Decorates a ClientHandler so AsyncClientHandler.send(ServerMessage) returns immediately — the actual delivery happens on a per-channel single-thread executor.
    AsyncClientHandler(ClientHandler, String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server.AsyncClientHandler

    clear() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.OfferTile
    Clears the totem from this tile, making it available again.
    CLEAR_SCREEN - Static variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.tui.Ansi
     
    clearLocalMatchState() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.client.ClientSession
    Resets local match state (snapshots + virtual-server binding) but keeps the connection.
    clearLowerBuildings() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Board
    Removes from the lower row the cards (buildings) destroyed at the start of Era III.
    clearLowerRow() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Board
    Removes from the lower row the cards that do not survive the round end.
    clearMatchBinding() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.client.VirtualServer
    Clears the local match/nickname binding WITHOUT notifying the server: used when the server tells us the match is gone (MatchClosedMessage), so the client can return to the "matches list" state and reuse the same connection for further list/create/join.
    ClientHandler - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server
    Server-side abstraction of a single client channel (send/close + binding state).
    ClientMain - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am22
    Client entry point.
    ClientRequest - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.message
    Base interface for all requests the client sends to the server.
    ClientRequestVisitor - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.message
    Visitor for client-to-server requests.
    ClientSession - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.client
    Pairs a ServerConnection with a VirtualServer and adds a snapshot-replay layer: an internal dispatcher captures every server message, caches the latest lobby/game state, then forwards it to the currently attached view handler.
    ClientSession(ServerConnection) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.client.ClientSession

    GREEN - Static variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.tui.Ansi
     
    GuiApp - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.gui
    JavaFX root: owns the Stage and the ClientSession, acts as the ServerHandler (marshalling messages onto the FX thread), and drives screen navigation: Connection → Nickname → Matches → Lobby → Game → EndGame.
    GuiApp() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.gui.GuiApp
     
    GuiScreen - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.gui.screen
    Contract for JavaFX screens.

    H

    handleAbandonRecovered(ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchSession
    Tears down a suspended match because a reconnecting player chose "Leave this match" instead of resuming it.
    handleAddPlayer(AddPlayerToLobbyRequest, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchSession
    Handles a lobby-join request (routed to a reconnect if the match is crash-recovered).
    handleChooseTotem(ChooseTotemRequest, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchSession
    Pre-game totem pick.
    handleDisconnect(String, ClientHandler, boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchSession
    Handles both a voluntary leave (transportDrop=false) and a transport drop (transportDrop=true).
    handleEraChange() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Game
    Applies an Era change: clears Era-III-destroyed buildings (only on Era III), shifts surviving buildings down, and reveals the market buildings of the new Era onto the board.
    handleHostCreateAndSetup(String, int, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchSession
    Coalesces "host joins + expected players set" into a single broadcast.
    handlePickBonusCard(PickBonusCardRequest, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchSession
    Handles an end-of-round bonus-card pick.
    handlePickCards(PickCardsRequest, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchSession
    Handles a card-pick move.
    handlePlaceTotem(PlaceTotemRequest, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchSession
    All three move handlers wrap the controller call in a VirtualView batch: a single move typically triggers 5-6 model notifications (state, active player, era, scoring...) and we want to coalesce them into one broadcast.
    handleReconnect(ReconnectRequest, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchSession
    Resumes a suspended match for a reconnecting player.
    handleRecoveryTimeout() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchSession
    Tears down a suspended match that nobody finished resuming within the allowed window.
    handleRemoveFromLobby(RemovePlayerFromLobbyRequest, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchSession
    Handles a player voluntarily leaving the lobby.
    handleRequest(ClientRequest, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchManager
    Entry point for every incoming client request: dispatches it through the visitor, turning any failure into an ErrorMessage for the caller.
    handleSetExpectedPlayers(SetExpectedPlayersRequest, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchSession
    Handles the host's request to change the expected player count.
    handleTransportDrop(ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchManager
    Called by the transports when the underlying connection drops without a DisconnectPlayerRequest (closed socket, RMI unreachable).
    hasExtraBuyAtRoundEnd() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Player
     
    hasExtraBuyAtRoundEnd() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Tribe

    I

    I - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Era
    First age: the cards in play at the start of the game.

    ping() - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server.rmi.RmiServerInterface
    No-op the client calls periodically to detect a dead server: RMI doesn't emit disconnect events, the only signal is a failed call.

    RmiServer.Handle - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server.rmi
    Holds the references needed to tear down an RMI publication: without them the registry and endpoint stay exported for the lifetime of the JVM, blocking the port and preventing in-process restarts.

    RoundUpdateState - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.states
    End-of-round cleanup phase: discards spent cards, shifts the rows, refills the upper row (advancing the Era if a higher-Era card surfaces), and recomputes the turn order from the turn-order tile.
